package.name: dg5f_calib_wizard
package.description: Interactive CLI wizard that calibrates manus_dg5f_sota_retarget_a yaml parameters by walking the user through a small set of canonical hand poses (open / fist / tip pinches / pad pinches), recording Manus glove ergonomics for each, and computing per-joint calib + per-pair pinch sigmoid bounds so the resulting retargeting reaches a configurable pinch target distance (default 1 mm). Lite v1: tunes calib[20] and pinch_close/far_ref_m[4]; thumb CMC gains and pinch_finger_frac are left for manual tweaks.
